title: Co-precipitation mechanism of Cu-rich phase and κ-carbide precipitates in Fe-28Mn-10Al-1C-3Cu austenitic low-density steel
abstract_summary: This paper investigates the co-precipitation mechanism of Cu-rich phase and κ-carbide in Fe-28Mn-10Al-1C-3Cu austenitic low-density steel. Adding Cu promotes κ-carbide precipitation, and κ-carbide in turn promotes FCC-structured Cu-rich phase precipitation. κ-carbide precipitates preferentially, with both phases exhibiting a cube-on-cube orientation relationship with the austenitic matrix. Key characterization includes HR-TEM, SAED, and EDS to analyze microstructure and lattice misfit.
research_objective: To clarify the co-precipitation behavior and mechanism of Cu-rich phase and κ-carbide in Fe-28Mn-10Al-1C-3Cu austenitic low-density steel.
